name: thinking-selector
description: Evaluations for thinking-selector skill trigger accuracy

evals.name: trigger-positive-explicit
evals.description: Skill should trigger when user is unsure which thinking tool to use

prompts.input: 怎样思考这个问题才能更系统？有什么框架可以帮助吗
prompts.reason: Chinese trigger '怎样思考' + explicit framework discovery intent

prompts.input: which thinking framework should I use for this?
I need to think about this more structured, what tools do you have?
用什么方法思考这个架构问题比较好？

evals.name: trigger-negative-general
evals.description: Skill should NOT trigger for specific thinking tools or non-thinking requests

prompts.input: 用第一性原理分析这个问题
prompts.reason: User already chose first-principles, should trigger that skill instead

prompts.input: Help me write a Python class for data processing
prompts.reason: Code writing request, should trigger coding skills

prompts.input: Create a product roadmap for next quarter
prompts.reason: Product planning request, should trigger roadmap-planner
General analysis request without explicit mention of framework/methodology choice - should trigger debugging/code-research, not tool selector
